name: raw_yuv_input
description: Raw YUV420P input via the rawvideo demuxer — the canonical bug-report fixture format and the simplest stress test for an explicit input format/pixfmt/size/rate combination. AVDict-style input options (`-pix_fmt`, `-video_size`, `-framerate`) work today via Input.Options passthrough; the gap is a typed schema affordance so the GUI can author this without raw-text knowledge of FFmpeg's option names.
blockers: typed-raw-input-schema (§2.1 'First-class raw-stream input' row — works via AVDict but no Input.Format/Pixfmt/VideoSize/FrameRate fields)
